inputs.label: Desired Epoxy Weight
inputs.businessContext: The total weight of the epoxy mixture needed before waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total weight of the epoxy mixture needed before waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atıktan önce ihtiyaç duyulan toplam epoksi karışımı ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Gesamtgewicht der Epoxidmischung, das vor Abfall benötigt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le poids total du mélange d'époxy nécessaire avant déchet.
businessContext_i18n.es: El peso total de la mezcla de epoxi necesaria antes del desperdicio.

inputs.label: Resin Ratio (parts)
inputs.businessContext: Parts of resin in the mixing ratio.

businessContext_i18n.en: Parts of resin in the mixing ratio.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Parties de résine dans le rapport de mélange.
businessContext_i18n.es: Partes de resina en la proporción de mezcla.

inputs.label: Hardener Ratio (parts)
inputs.businessContext: Parts of hardener in the mixing ratio.

businessContext_i18n.en: Parts of hardener in the mixing ratio.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Parties de durcisseur dans le rapport de mélange.
businessContext_i18n.es: Partes de endurecedor en la proporción de mezcla.

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage to account for waste and spillage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage to account for waste and spillage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık ve dökülme için ek yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Prozentsatz zur Berücksichtigung von Abfall und Verschütten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage supplémentaire pour tenir compte des déchets et des pertes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje adicional para tener en cuenta residuos y derrames.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
